inputs.label: Card Market Price (Ungraded)
inputs.businessContext: Current market value of the ungraded card

inputs.label: Grading Cost
inputs.businessContext: Total cost to submit card for professional grading

inputs.label: Expected Grade Multiplier
inputs.businessContext: Factor by which card value multiplies upon achieving the expected grade

inputs.label: Shipping & Insurance
inputs.businessContext: Combined shipping and insurance cost for round-trip

inputs.label: Selling Fee (%)
inputs.businessContext: Platform or auction house fee as a percentage of the final sale price
